commit.message:
fix: wrap file upload in try/catch to prevent stuck uploading state

If /api/upload returns non-JSON (e.g. Render 500 HTML error), res.json()
would throw and uploading/uploadingIdx state would stay true forever,
permanently disabling the upload button. Fixed in cart, academy, and admin
store pages using finally block to guarantee state is reset.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: plan renewal at $19 + remove commission on upgrades/renewals

Renewal rules:
- First activation (NONE → plan): full price + 20% sponsor commission
- Upgrade (BASIC→PRO etc.): differential price, NO commission
- Renewal (same plan): fixed $19 USD, NO commission, extends expiry

Changes:
- pack-requests: allow same-plan renewal at $19 (AppSetting PRICE_RENEWAL);
  block only downgrades; extend plan_expires_at on renewal CRYPTO path
- admin/purchases: allow renewal approval; extend expiry (not reset);
  commission only when currentRank === 0
- purchases/verify cron: detect renewal by plan match; extend vs set plan;
  commission only on first activation
- activate-plan: allow renewal; extend expiry; commission only from NONE

empty state message, and search reset on close. 7 E2E tests added.

fix: remove 29 duplicate gallery images across 10 articles

Watchdog detected images repeated 3+ times per page in product cards.
Removed all duplicate occurrences, keeping only the first instance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add API and SQL fast-paths: skip LLM extraction when structured fields exist

Replicates the MCP fast-path pattern for API and SQL test cases:
- _extract_api_params_from_steps(): reads method, endpoint, headers,
  request_body directly from test step fields. Auto-selects api_smoke
  vs api_crud based on CRUD verb count. Zero LLM, zero hallucination.
- _extract_sql_params_from_steps(): reads sql_script directly from
  test step fields. Routes to db_query template.
- _parse_expected_status(): regex extraction of HTTP status from text.
- _parse_expected_fields(): extracts expected fields from assertions
  and expected_result text.
- LLM extraction is now FALLBACK only — used when structured fields
  are missing (legacy test cases without method/endpoint).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
chore: post-release sync — lessons, docs, roadmap after #226 (#227)

* chore: add CI shield workflow and compiled rules (#222)

- Add shield.yml: deterministic shield on PRs (zero LLM, compiled regex rules)
- Add concurrency control to ci.yml
- Commit compiled-rules.json (24 rules from 114 lessons)

Closes #222

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: fetch full git history in shield workflow

Shallow checkout lacks origin/main, causing getDefaultBranch to fail.
fetch-depth: 0 ensures the branch diff can be computed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: resolve default branch in CI where only origin/main exists

In CI environments (actions/checkout), the local 'main' ref doesn't
exist — only 'origin/main'. Updated getDefaultBranch() and
getGitBranchDiff() to try remote refs as fallback.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: exclude compiled-rules.json from deterministic shield scan

The compiled rules file self-matches its own patterns (e.g., the
os.tmpdir() rule message contains "os.tmpdir()"). Exclude it from
the diff scan via new excludeFiles parameter on applyRules().

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: remove over-broad shell variable quoting rule from compiled rules

The regex `(^|\s)\$(...)`  false-positives on TypeScript template
literals like `${baseBranch}`. The lesson stays in lessons.md for
the LLM shield which has semantic context to distinguish languages.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* chore: post-release sync — lessons, docs, roadmap after #226

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

commit.message:
Add /build-think-skill meta-skill and comprehensive guide

New meta-skill: /build-think-skill takes source material and produces a
complete SKILL.md following the thirteen-part architecture. Automates the
process used to build the six existing think skills — reads sources,
extracts vocabulary/method/voice, writes all thirteen parts, runs a
nine-point self-assessment.

Guide (GUIDE.md, .docx, .pdf): step-by-step documentation of the think
skill system — what a think skill is, how to use /build-think-skill,
multi-turn usage patterns, twelve principles from the build process,
subject selection criteria, checklist, and appendix with the full
thirteen-part architecture.

commit.message:
Add first-person answer mode for meeting context

Enables answering questions as if the user is speaking in the meeting.
When enabled, Claude formats responses in first person using:
- "I", "we", "our" instead of "you should"
- Meeting-appropriate conversational tone
- Concise answers (60-200 words)

Example:
- Before: "The code should be updated..."
- After: "I think we should update the code..."

Added toggle in Behavior settings to easily enable/disable.
System prompt updated to guide Claude when mode is active.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix V4 search queries: replace site:linkedin.com with intitle: dorks

3 niches (fractional_cfo, ma_advisory, esg_consulting) used
site:linkedin.com/company/ in pool_a — but linkedin.com is in the
noise domain filter, causing 0 leads despite 10 results found.
Replace pool_a queries with intitle: dorks that return actual
company websites (same pattern that works for cmmc/ai_automation).

commit.message:
Allow sliding finger across d-pad buttons on mobile

Touch events are bound to the originating element, so sliding from one
d-pad button to another never triggered the new direction. Handle touch
at the d-pad container level using elementFromPoint to track which button
the finger is over, releasing the old direction and pressing the new one
on touchmove.

repository.name: AutoWebMCP
repository.description: Framework for deriving reusable MCP servers from web applications

commit.message:
fix: disable transactions on all creates in claims ingestion

MongoDB replica set sessions conflict when many creates happen in rapid
succession with afterChange hooks. Use disableTransaction on all create
calls in ingest.ts and constraints.ts via createNoTx wrapper.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: Render boolean admin settings as toggle switches instead of number inputs

The platform_launched setting (and future boolean settings) now displays
as an intuitive on/off toggle that saves immediately on click, rather than
a number input that required typing "true"/"false" manually.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add themes, charts, interactive inputs, sharing UI, and mobile fixes

Frontend changes spanning multiple features:

Themes: dark/light/threshold via [data-theme] CSS custom properties,
  grid texture on threshold theme, applied from deck.meta.theme

Charts: bar (animated fills), scorecard (KPI cards with deltas),
  comparison (table with checkmarks) — all responsive

Interactive inputs: slider, multiselect (chip grid), ranking
  (drag-to-reorder with touch support), scale (rating matrix).
  Captured values stored in deckInputs, included in session data.

Sharing: share overlay with copy-link, public/login visibility toggle,
  /d/<id> boot detection, apiFetch() helper for identity headers

Dynamic wizard: gen-analyze node calls /api/wizard, injects content-aware
  branch questions. Dynamic nodes created on-the-fly in navigateTo().

Mobile: overflow-y:auto on slides, 100dvh fallback, swipe requires
  dx>60 AND dx>dy*2 (prevents scroll from navigating), 44px slider
  thumbs, 16px input fonts (prevents iOS zoom), safe-area-inset-bottom

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Phase 3: Scheduled Lead Gen + Pipeline Report command

Scheduler:
- Added 'leadgen' to SCHEDULE_COMMAND_MAP so it fires automatically
- Days-of-week filter: client.leadgenSchedule.days (0=Sun..6=Sat) skips off-days
- GET /api/clients/:id/leadgen/next-run returns next UTC time + days label

New command:
- 'leadgen-report': fast pipeline health report — no browser, reads JSON files,
  calculates stage breakdown, highlights hot leads, flags stuck follows,
  suggests next actions, shows conversion rate

Admin UI:
- 'Lead Gen — Pipeline Report' added to command picker
- Schedule sub-section in Lead Gen Config tab: time picker + day checkboxes
- Save Schedule / Disable Schedule buttons (write to client.schedule.leadgen)
- Next-run label auto-loaded when Lead Gen tab opens

commit.message:
feat: add .mli interface files for 21 internal modules (#36)

* feat: add .mli interface files for 21 internal modules

Add explicit module interfaces with documentation for modules that
previously relied on compiler-inferred signatures. Generated from
.cmt files via ocaml-print-intf with docstring extraction from .ml.

Modules: dtls_codec, dtls_eio, dtls_functor, dtls_io, dtls_retransmit,
dtls_sctp_transport, dtls_types, eio_sctp_full_transport,
eio_udp_transport, ice_eio, log, sctp_full_transport, sctp_heartbeat,
sctp_parallel_rx, sctp_pr, sctp_reliable, sctp_ring_buffer,
sctp_shutdown, sctp_transport, time_compat, udp_transport

Build: 0 errors, 302 tests pass (0 failures)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: use explicit functor keyword in dtls_functor.mli

ocaml-print-intf generates shorthand `module Make : (T : ...) -> sig`
syntax which ppx_deriving preprocessor cannot parse. Changed to the
explicit `module Make : functor (T : ...) -> sig` form.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: address cross-model review findings on .mli interfaces

- ice_eio.mli: narrow run_checks first arg from 'a to t
- dtls_eio.mli: narrow run sw param from 'a to Eio.Switch.t
- time_compat.mli: remove global_clock ref from public interface
- sctp_parallel_rx.mli: make Mpsc_queue.node and Mpsc_queue.t abstract

Remaining items (mutable record exposure in dtls_types, dtls_eio,
dtls_sctp_transport) deferred to future refactoring PR as they
require adding accessor functions across the library.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

commit.message:
chore: Remove UniversalItems broadcast path [Midtown !2176] (#1906)

* chore: Remove UniversalItems broadcast path (Phase 3 cleanup)

Remove the now-unused ephemeral broadcast infrastructure for tool call
display, completing the unification on msg.tool_data.

Removed:
- src/universal_events/ module (types, Claude converter, tests)
- process_universal_events() from stream.rs
- BroadcastUniversalItems effect variant and executor
- recent_tool_items field from DaemonState
- collect_tool_activity/serialize_tool_activity from RPC
- tool_activity field from coworkers.status RPC response
- UniversalItemsData and WebUpdate::UniversalItems from web.rs
- Client-side universal_items WebSocket handler (already no-op)
- ~500 lines of related tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* chore: Remove dead tool_activity code from web, TUI, and E2E tests

Addresses review feedback: now that the RPC no longer returns
tool_activity, remove all consumer code that was reading it.

- web.rs: remove tool_activity extraction from RPC and JSON response
- TUI app.rs: remove ToolActivityEntry struct, tool_activity field,
  extract_tool_activity_headers, merge_tool_activity, visible_tool_entries,
  clear_channel_lead_thinking_for_in_progress, and all related tests
- TUI chat.rs: simplify draw_lead_indicator to only show thinking/idle
  (no tool entry rendering), lead_indicator_height is now always 1
- E2E tests: remove wait_for_tool_activity, run_fake_lead_tool_activity_test,
  and two test functions, plus now-unused FakeCliScope helpers

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
